overview: I converted my Feature Spec Generator CLI into a Streamlit web app, deployed it to Streamlit Cloud, and wired MS Teams webhooks for visibility — all in 5 days. 12 specs generated on rollout day. Shipped v1, not v4, and got real feedback that's now shaping v3.

keyPoints.title: Deployed to Streamlit Cloud in under 10 minutes
Teams webhook answered 'Is anyone using this?' in 10 minutes
Claude silently shipped v1 instead of v4 multi-agent build
12 specs generated on first rollout day
Session state and rerun are Streamlit's core mechanics
